slides.title: Building for All Screens 📱💻
slides.content:
# Responsive Design

Flutter apps should look good on phones, tablets, and desktops.

Techniques:
* Use `MediaQuery` to get screen dimensions.
* `LayoutBuilder` to adapt based on parent constraints.
* `Expanded` and `Flexible` for flexible layouts.
* `OrientationBuilder` to react to orientation changes.
* Use `FractionallySizedBox` for percentage-based sizing.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `AspectRatio` for fixed proportions

If you want a widget to maintain a specific aspect ratio, wrap it in `AspectRatio(aspectRatio: 16/9)`.
